templates.title: Top-K frequent elements
templates.description: K elemen paling sering muncul dari iterable.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(items, k={{k_default}}):
    """Return k elemen paling frequent."""
    from collections import Counter
    counter = Counter(items)
    return [item for item, _ in counter.most_common(k)]
